title: senecio helminthioides
intro: Senecio helminthioides, also known as Groundsel Bush or Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio helminthioides include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
